urlset:
https://addictingwordgames.com weekly 1
{% for title in titles %}
https://addictingwordgames.com/play-game/{{ title }} weekly 0.6
{% endfor %}
https://addictingwordgames.com/typing-tower-defense weekly 0.8
https://addictingwordgames.com/typing-game weekly 0.8
https://addictingwordgames.com/wordle weekly 0.8
https://addictingwordgames.com/word-phzzle weekly 0.8
https://addictingwordgames.com/word-jumble weekly 0.8
https://addictingwordgames.com/about weekly 0.1
https://addictingwordgames.com/terms weekly 0
https://addictingwordgames.com/privacy-policy weekly 0
https://addictingwordgames.com/contact weekly 0
